The Partnership

Built for Utah.
Backed by the Best.

The Utah Restaurant Association has always championed local restaurant success. That's why the URA has partnered with Global Payments' Genius platform — to give members access to enterprise-grade restaurant technology at a fraction of the cost.

Under Global Payments' Dual Pricing model, Utah Restaurant Association members can take advantage of deep discounts on hardware, software, and installation and ongoing support offered by local Utah partners — including options with zero upfront cost.

What Utah Restaurant Association Members Get

More Value. Zero Compromise.

An exclusive package designed specifically to help Utah restaurants thrive — only available through your Utah Restaurant Association membership.

🏷️

Up to 100% Free to Start

Under Global Payments' Dual Pricing model, Utah Restaurant Association members can qualify for hardware, software, installation and ongoing support offered by local Utah partners at zero cost — no upfront investment required.

🔒

3-Year Rate Lock

Lock in your payment processing rates for three years. No surprise increases. No hidden fees. Just predictable costs that make budgeting and forecasting simple.

📱

Mobile + Countertop POS

From tableside handheld ordering to countertop checkout, Genius adapts to how your restaurant works — whether you're a food truck or a fine-dining establishment.

🍽️

Built for Restaurants

Waitlist management, online ordering, loyalty programs, kitchen display systems — every feature was designed specifically for food service operations.

📊

Real-Time Insights

Run sales reports and use live data to fine-tune staffing, menus, promotions and more. Make smarter decisions every shift, not just at month end.

🤝

24/7/365 Support

Live agent support from real restaurant industry experts — available by text, chat, email, or phone whenever you need it, on your schedule.
